title: The Absolutely Abstemious Ass,
content:
The Absolutely Abstemious Ass,
    who resided in a Barrel, and only lived on
    Soda Water and Pickled Cucumbers.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "The Absolutely Abstemious Ass,", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
